creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #1)
It's default, I haven't changed any locale settings.

nobody@132arm64-usrports:/usr/ports/lang/gcc12 % locale
LANG=C.UTF-8
LC_CTYPE="C.UTF-8"
LC_COLLATE="C.UTF-8"
LC_TIME="C.UTF-8"
LC_NUMERIC="C.UTF-8"
LC_MONETARY="C.UTF-8"
LC_MESSAGES="C.UTF-8"
LC_ALL=
